run_summary.summary: Active day across three deals! JLab payment is still MIA — Liz followed up with the agent today and the agent is chasing JLab accounting directly (apparently others on the same campaign were paid two weeks ago 👀). Aleve came back with revision requests on the submitted content — the VO didn't follow the approved script language and the required disclaimers (#AlevePartner in the first 5 seconds) are missing. Liz says she'll fix it. On Flexsteel, Ian at Popfly sorted out the account access issue and asked Kenny to try applying again — and there's a retail store visit locked in for Thursday, April 23rd. Finally, Linkind (solar pathway lights) is an active paid deal that I'm logging — product arrived, the concept is waiting on brand approval before filming, and Liz is following up today.

suggestions.message: The agent expects to hear back from JLab accounting tomorrow (Apr 22). If nothing comes through by EOD, worth a second nudge — being paid weeks after everyone else on the campaign is a red flag worth staying on top of.

Liz needs to redo the voiceover to match the approved script language AND add the #AlevePartner disclosure in the first 5 seconds. The script is in the Google Drive link the agent shared. This is blocking approval — worth prioritizing today or tomorrow.
Kenny should try re-applying to the Flexsteel campaign on Popfly today — Ian removed the access requirement. Also confirm the retail store visit is still on for Thursday 11:30 AM.

deals.next_action: Follow up on payment if no response from agent by Apr 22
deals.notes: [Apr 21]: Liz followed up with agent re: still no JLab payment. Agent says she's in contact with JLab accounting — others on the same campaign pulse were paid ~2 weeks ago. Agent expects to hear back Apr 22.

deals.next_action: Redo VO per Aleve's approved script and add #AlevePartner disclaimer (first 5 seconds)

deals.next_action: Follow up with agent on Linkind concept approval

[Apr 20]: Brand asked for time breakdown to confirm product is featured 50%+ of video. Liz clarified her 'Top 3 Tips' concept — lights are the main feature, will show setup, app, day/night footage, and key features. Waiting for brand to approve concept before filming begins.
